## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` returns 0 issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] Firestore rules updated if schema changed
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
